text: The visual cortex processes a moderate, attention‑guided visual scene without strong affective or narrative overlay.
confidence: medium; would change if visual activation rose above ~0.4 or dorsal attention fell below 0.05.
raw:
Reading: The visual cortex processes a moderate, attention‑guided visual scene without strong affective or narrative overlay.  
Confidence: medium; would change if visual activation rose above ~0.4 or dorsal attention fell below 0.05.  
Cite: [Allen et al. 2022, Nature Neuroscience]
